description: You are a Quality Control Inspector at a furniture manufacturing facility using Odoo 17 (http://localhost:8069, login: admin / admin). Establish an incoming material inspection protocol by creating three specific Quality Control Points and updating existing quality checks. Create a Quality Control Point titled "Structural Integrity Verification - Cabinet" for the product "Cabinet with Doors" with Operation Type set to Receipts, Control Type set to Pass - Fail, and Instructions: "Verify all structural joints meet ISO 9001:2015 Clause 8.5.1 requirements. Check weld integrity, fastener torque values per drawing DWG-CB-0088, and dimensional conformance to ±0.5mm tolerance." Create a Quality Control Point titled "Acoustic Attenuation Test - Screens" for the product "Acoustic Bloc Screens" with Operation Type set to Receipts, Control Type set to Measure, and Instructions: "Measure sound transmission loss at 500 Hz, 1000 Hz, and 2000 Hz per ASTM E90. Minimum attenuation: 15 dB at 500 Hz, 22 dB at 1000 Hz, 30 dB at 2000 Hz." Create a Quality Control Point titled "Ergonomic Compliance Check - Chair" for the product "Office Chair" with Operation Type set to Receipts, Control Type set to Instructions, and Failure Message: "REJECT: Chair fails BIFMA X5.1-2017 compliance. Quarantine unit, issue NCR to supplier, and notify QA Manager per escalation procedure ESP-QA-003." Finally, process the existing quality checks by marking "Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish" as Passed and "Dimension Verification - Screen Width" as Failed.
